creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mina Galić from comment #1)
swt in ports is outdated. Recent versions may have been fixed already, but they have dropped java8 support, so we need to make sure that all swt dependent ports work with java11 before updating swt. I have a patch for graphics/jogamp-jogl, but not for math/scilab yet.
